access_token.description: Spotify Ads OAuth access token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <access_token>). Never logged.

base_url.description: Spotify Ads API base URL override for tests or proxies.

ad_account_id.description: Spotify Ads ad account ID; required by the campaigns, ad_sets, and ads streams to substitute the {ad_account_id} path segment.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
